metrolink: On Thursday 11th and Friday 12th June The Weeknd plays at Etihad Stadium. Services will be busier than usual so please plan your journey in advance.

crew_quote: "Blimey, it's 15 degrees out and I still can't decide if I should put on a coat or just accept that I'm always 20 degrees too hot from all the curry!"
